name: Raspberry Pie Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread raspberries evenly in the unbaked pie shell.
2. In a separate bowl, stir together sour cream, sugar, flour, and salt until well combined.
3. Spoon the mixture over the berries, spreading it to the edge of the shell.
4. Sprinkle 2 teaspoons of sugar on top.
5. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake for an additional 30 minutes or until the topping is lightly browned.
7. Allow to cool at room temperature; serve fresh.
